title: Daily Missions
description: DailyMissions adds fully customizable daily and weekly missions to your server complete tasks, earn rewards, and keep players engaged!
body:
**DailyMissions** is a lightweight but powerful plugin that introduces daily and weekly missions to your Minecraft server. Players can complete randomized tasks — such as mining ores, farming crops, slaying mobs, fishing, crafting, or exploring — and claim configurable rewards.

Perfect for survival and economy-based servers, DailyMissions integrates seamlessly with Vault for money rewards and supports PlaceholderAPI for scoreboard or chat placeholders.

# ✨ Features

- 🗓️ Daily & Weekly Missions – fresh challenges that reset automatically.
- ⚔️ Multiple Mission Types – mining, farming, mob kills, crafting, fishing, exploring, taming, and more.
- 🎁 Flexible Rewards – give money (Vault), items, XP, or run custom commands.
- 📊 Progress Tracking – live updates as players complete their missions.
- 🎮 Player & Admin Commands – claim rewards, check progress, reset or assign missions.
- 🔧 Highly Configurable – tweak mission pools, rewards, and messages to fit your server.
- ⚡ Optimized for Performance – designed for Paper/Spigot servers without lag.
- 🔌 Compatible with any Vault-based economy plugin (EssentialsX, CMI, etc.)

## 🔗 Dependencies

- Required: Vault
- Optional: PlaceholderAPI

### 📂 Compatibility

- Minecraft Versions: 1.19 → 1.21
- Server Software: Paper / Spigot
